task_completion.description: Create a 50mm x 50mm square plate with 6mm thickness.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A square 3D plate is visible in the FreeCAD 3D view. The model tree should show a Pad or Extrude feature.

task_completion.description: Include a 22mm diameter central pilot hole through the entire plate.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A large circular hole is visible in the exact center of the square plate, going all the way through.

task_completion.description: Create four mounting holes with a 31mm center-to-center spacing.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Four smaller holes are arranged in a square pattern symmetrically around the central pilot hole.

task_completion.description: Mounting holes must be M3 countersunk (90 degrees) and created using the Hole tool.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The four mounting holes have chamfered/slanted edges at the top (countersunk). The FreeCAD model tree MUST show a 'Hole' feature (not just a 'Pocket') used for these four holes.

task_completion.description: Apply 5mm fillets to the four outer corners.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The four outer corners of the main square plate are rounded. A 'Fillet' feature should be visible in the model tree.

task_completion.description: Save the completed file as nema_plate.FCStd.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The FreeCAD window title bar, tab name, or a file explorer window shows the filename 'nema_plate.FCStd'.

integrity.description: The agent used the FreeCAD GUI to design the part.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the FreeCAD interface with toolbars, 3D view, and model tree active, rather than just a terminal window.

integrity.description: The agent built the model step-by-step rather than loading a pre-made file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The model tree shows a sequence of features (e.g., Sketch, Pad, Pocket, Hole, Fillet) being added over time across multiple screenshots.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the modeling process by executing a single pre-written script to generate the final file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with FreeCAD's graphical tools (Sketcher, PartDesign) or step-by-step Python console commands, not just running a single external script.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The NEMA 17 mounting plate must be 50x50x6mm. The central pilot hole is 22mm in diameter. The 4 mounting holes must be M3 metric with 90-degree countersinks, spaced 31mm center-to-center. CRITICAL: The mounting holes MUST be created using the PartDesign 'Hole' tool (look for a 'Hole' feature icon in the tree view, not a 'Pocket'). The 4 outer corners must have 5mm fillets. The final file must be saved as 'nema_plate.FCStd'.
